title: Cyclobalanopsis xanthotricha
taxonomy: Cyclobalanopsis xanthotricha is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, Fagaceae. It is native to China and classified as a member of the genus Cyclobalanopsis, which is a group of Asian beech trees. This species is closely related to other species within the Cyclobalanopsis genus, which are characterized by their smooth, gray bark and dark green leaves. Cyclobalanopsis xanthotricha is often found growing in mountainous regions, where it can thrive in a variety of conditions. The classification of Cyclobalanopsis xanthotricha reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations to its native environment.
